title: 2-Pack Glass Food Storage Containers with Tempered Lids (630ml/2.7cup) - Airtight Snap Lock, Microwave & Oven Safe (-20°C~510°C), Freezer to Baking Dish, BPA-Free, Gift Box（Blue）
features: 【Premium Glass Food Containers with Lids】 Made from high borosilicate glass, these 630ml/21.3oz containers withstand temperatures from -20°C to 510°C, perfect for baking and freezing.
【Microwave-Safe & Even Heating】 The tempered glass lids allow for microwave use without odor transfer, ensuring food heats evenly and stays fresh.
【Snap-On Lids with Air Valve】 Designed for easy opening and durability, these lids resist warping and are simple to clean (hand wash only).
【Stylish Gift-Ready Packaging】 Comes in an elegant gift box, ideal for housewarmings or anyone who loves practical kitchenware.
【Dishwasher-Safe Glass Body】The glass containers are dishwasher-safe, though lids require hand washing for long-lasting use.
description: Product Description Instructions for Use 1.Identify the correct orientation of the silicone gasket (top and bottom). 2. Align the cover with the edge of the glass body. 3.Press down and then fasten the buckles. 4. Secure the short sides first, then the long sides. The video showcases the product in use.
